name: Antus Flonius
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. During the day, wears iron boots, coarse linens, and a cuirass. Armed with an iron longsword and iron shield. At night, he changes into a green wool shirt and oiled linen shoes.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: warrior, idle, guild-member
Role: An Apprentice of the Fighters Guild in Leyawiin. The Leyawiin Guild Hall is located next door to the competing Blackwood Company, and as a result, Antus lives a life with no assignments and little to do.
Home Location Information: The Fighters Guild hall in Leyawiin, where he sleeps in the east wing on the second floor.
Daily Routine: Antus sleeps in the east wing on the second floor between midnight and 6am. Upon waking, he crosses the hallway to meet fellow guild member Brodras for a four-hour sparring session. After that he heads down to the ground floor and wanders around until lunchtime at noon. After two hours he goes up to the western area of the third floor and relaxes there for two hours. At 4pm he heads downstairs again and spends time chatting with other members before finding a seat at the dinner table at 6pm. He eats for three hours and spends the last hours of his day on the ground floor until he goes to bed at midnight.
Personality - The Idle Fighter: Antus represents the unfortunate state of the Leyawiin Fighters Guild. With the Blackwood Company operating right next door and stealing away contracts, he finds himself with no assignments and plenty of empty time. Despite this lack of work, he maintains his discipline through daily sparring sessions with Brodras, suggesting a warrior who keeps himself ready even when there's nothing to be ready for.
author: Bethesda
